title: rubus podophyllos subsp. longithyrsus
intro: Rubus podophyllos subsp. longithyrsus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a subspecies of the Rubus podophyllos species, a type of wild raspberry native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rubus podophyllos subsp. longithyrsus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
